name: Sniper 3D Assassin: Free to Play
short_description: Sniper 3D Assassin® in 7 words: great gameplay, awesome visuals and entertaining missions.
detailed_description:
Sniper 3D Assassin® in 7 words: great gameplay, awesome visuals and entertaining missions.

Hundreds of challenging missions

Play in over 850+ thrilling missions and 13 different worlds as you dive in this addictive game

Develop your sniper skills

Embark on real world operations when shooting under rain, wind and fog. Try to hit moving targets from unstable platforms

Tons of customizable weapons

Make sure you explore your arsenal's full potential by customizing over 150+ snipers and rifles

Become an owner now

Download now for free and have access to frequent updates and new game content periodically


Sniper 3D Assassin® is brought to you by Fun Games For Free
